description: This pipeline is designed to modify table structures by adding and removing columns, allowing for flexible data manipulation and transformation, where existing columns can be optionally replaced or removed as needed.

189a96de-f1e2-401f-9a2d-761a1f6a3b93.name: table-add-columns-generate
189a96de-f1e2-401f-9a2d-761a1f6a3b93.description: Adds a new column. By default no changes are applied if the column already exists. Can be optionally configured to replace existing columns.

7b582973-2ad0-4850-bef9-1af43d0a6493.name: table-remove-columns
7b582973-2ad0-4850-bef9-1af43d0a6493.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name
